fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontArguments` collects the arguments used to create or clone a typeface with specific settings, such as a font collection index, a variation design position, a color palette index, and palette color overrides. Pass an instance to <xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.Clone(SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments)> to produce a customized typeface.

This is a `ref struct` and cannot be boxed or stored on the heap.

## Examples

```csharp
var args = new SKFontArguments
{
    CollectionIndex = 0,
    VariationDesignPosition = new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate[]
    {
        new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate { Axis = SKFourByteTag.Parse("wght"), Value = 700 },
    },
};
using var boldFace = typeface.Clone(args);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Specifies the arguments used to create or clone a typeface with custom settings.

fields.value: The zero-based index of the font within a font collection (TTC file). The default value is 0.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the index of the desired font face within a font collection.

fields.value: The zero-based index of the color palette to select. The default value is 0.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the index of the color palette to use for a color font.

fields.value: A read-only span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> values that override individual palette colors.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the per-color overrides applied to the selected color palette.

fields.value: A read-only span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values, each specifying an axis tag and a design-space coordinate value.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the variation design position used to configure variable font axes.
